contract.summary: navigation V3 能力模板（fixed_node 目标由 spellID 真值映射到数字 node ID，炉石仍保留运行时解析）

joins: spellname 负责收集炉石、传送与传送门候选法术名
spelleffect 负责区分 teleport / portal / hearth 候选
skilllineability / skillline / chrclasses 恢复职业与阵营线索
spell_target_overrides 提供 fixed_node 法术的 spellID -> target UiMapID 真值
select: templates_raw：能力候选法术的原始 spell / skillline / effect 字段
spell_target_overrides：fixed_node 法术的显式目标 UiMap 真值
supplemental：按 spellID 真值把 fixed_node 法术落到 map_anchor 节点，只输出 V1 可消费模板
where: 只收炉石、传送与传送门候选
fixed_node 目标不再通过名字/限定词反推，统一由 spell_target_overrides 提供 spellID -> target UiMapID 真值
query.row_granularity: templates_raw 一行代表一个导航能力候选法术

templates_raw.sql:
SELECT
  CAST(sn.ID AS INTEGER) AS spell_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(sn.Name_lang), ''), 'Spell #' || CAST(sn.ID AS TEXT)) AS spell_name,
  CAST(COALESCE((SELECT MIN(CAST(sla.SkillLine AS INTEGER)) FROM skilllineability sla WHERE CAST(sla.Spell AS INTEGER) = CAST(sn.ID AS INTEGER) AND CAST(COALESCE(sla.SkillLine, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS skillline_id,
  CAST(COALESCE((SELECT MAX(CAST(sla.ClassMask AS INTEGER)) FROM skilllineability sla WHERE CAST(sla.Spell AS INTEGER) = CAST(sn.ID AS INTEGER)), 0) AS INTEGER) AS class_mask,
  CAST(COALESCE((SELECT MAX(CAST(sla.RaceMask AS INTEGER)) FROM skilllineability sla WHERE CAST(sla.Spell AS INTEGER) = CAST(sn.ID AS INTEGER)), 0) AS INTEGER) AS race_mask,
  CAST(COALESCE((SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN CAST(se.Effect AS INTEGER) = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM spelleffect se WHERE CAST(se.SpellID AS INTEGER) = CAST(sn.ID AS INTEGER)), 0) AS INTEGER) AS has_portal_effect,
  CAST(COALESCE((SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN CAST(se.Effect AS INTEGER) IN (15, 252) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM spelleffect se WHERE CAST(se.SpellID AS INTEGER) = CAST(sn.ID AS INTEGER)), 0) AS INTEGER) AS has_teleport_effect
FROM spellname sn
WHERE sn.Name_lang = '炉石'
   OR sn.Name_lang LIKE '传送：%'
   OR sn.Name_lang LIKE '传送门：%'
   OR sn.Name_lang LIKE '远古传送门：%'
ORDER BY CAST(sn.ID AS INTEGER)

joins: spelleffect se（通过相关子查询恢复 portal / teleport effect 线索）
skilllineability sla（通过相关子查询恢复 SkillLine / ClassMask / RaceMask）
where: 法术名为 炉石，或以 传送： / 传送门： / 远古传送门： 开头
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个导航能力候选法术

where: 固定落点法术必须显式声明 spellID -> target UiMapID 真值
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 fixed_node 法术的目标 UiMap 真值

change_log.summary: 初始契约：导出 navigation V1 能力模板（炉石 + 可静态解析目标的职业旅行法术）
fixed_node 模板目标迁移为不透明数字 node ID，与 navigation_route_edges 共用 map_anchor 分配规则
fixed_node 法术目标改为 spellID -> target UiMapID 显式真值，不再从名称或限定词反推落点
